title: Packaging the OEs with the host
title_translation: 光器件与主芯片共封装

paragraphs.source: The OEs themselves are placed on a substrate, after which the substrate is flip-chip bonded to the host package. For co-packaging the OEs a lot of package area is required. This necessitates significantly enlarging either the package substrate or interposer, depending on where it is placed. For Nvidia’s Spectrum-X Photonics switch ASIC package, the substrate will measure 110mm by 110mm. For context, this compares to the Blackwell package at 70mm by 76mm which is a very big chip in its own right.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The OEs themselves are placed on a substrate, after which the substrate is flip-chip bonded to the host package. For co-packaging the OEs a lot of package area is required. This necessitates significantly enlarging either the package substrate or interposer, depending on where it is placed. For Nvidia’s Spectrum-X Photonics switch ASIC package, the substrate will measure 110mm by 110mm. For context, this compares to the Blackwell package at 70mm by 76mm which is a very big chip in its own right.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The OEs themselves are placed on a substrate, after which the substrate is flip-chip bonded to the host package. For co-packaging the OEs a lot of package area is required. This necessitates significantly enlarging either the package substrate or interposer, depending on where it is placed. For Nvidia’s Spectrum-X Photonics switch ASIC package, the substrate will measure 110mm by 110mm. For context, this compares to the Blackwell package at 70mm by 76mm which is a very big chip in its own right.

pro.text:
**修订后的译文：**

光引擎（Optical Engine，OE）先置于基板之上，再经倒装芯片键合与主机封装相连。共封装光学（CPO）需占用大量封装面积，因此必须大幅扩大封装基板或中介层，具体取决于其放置位置。对于英伟达Spectrum-X Photonics交换机ASIC封装而言，其基板尺寸将达110mm×110mm。作为对比，布莱克韦尔（Blackwell）封装尺寸为70mm×76mm，本身已是相当庞大的芯片。

issues.description: Optical Engine (OE) 首次出现未按术语表要求完整注释
被动语态堆积且翻译腔明显
句子过度拆分且失去原文节奏
翻译腔明显，使用过多“以完成...并最终完成”结构
原文语气冷静且带分析性，译文语气过于平淡且逻辑连接生硬
语义略显重叠且可更紧凑

paragraphs.source: Additionally, attaching more elements to the substrate presents yield challenges. Again, for Spectrum-X, 36 known good OEs need to be flip-chip bonded onto the substrate first – before bonding the interposer module for the ‘on Substrate’ step to complete the CoWoS assembly.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Additionally, attaching more elements to the substrate presents yield challenges. Again, for Spectrum-X, 36 known good OEs need to be flip-chip bonded onto the substrate first – before bonding the interposer module for the ‘on Substrate’ step to complete the CoWoS assembly.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Additionally, attaching more elements to the substrate presents yield challenges. Again, for Spectrum-X, 36 known good OEs need to be flip-chip bonded onto the substrate first – before bonding the interposer module for the ‘on Substrate’ step to complete the CoWoS assembly.

pro.text: 此外，在基板上附加更多元件也带来良率挑战。以Spectrum-X为例，必须先将36颗已知良好的光引擎（OE）倒装键合到基板上，再键合中介层模块，才能完成“基板上”步骤并最终完成CoWoS组装。

paragraphs.source: Similarly, for the interposer, the need to manufacture a much larger interposer is costly and it requires bonding many more elements, presents yield challenges. Additionally, these challenges are exacerbated by warpage issues, which become more pronounced as interposer/substrate size scales.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Similarly, for the interposer, the need to manufacture a much larger interposer is costly and it requires bonding many more elements, presents yield challenges. Additionally, these challenges are exacerbated by warpage issues, which become more pronounced as interposer/substrate size scales.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Similarly, for the interposer, the need to manufacture a much larger interposer is costly and it requires bonding many more elements, presents yield challenges. Additionally, these challenges are exacerbated by warpage issues, which become more pronounced as interposer/substrate size scales.

pro.text: 同样，制造尺寸大得多的中介层不仅成本高昂，还需键合更多元件，进一步加剧了良率挑战。这些挑战又因翘曲问题而雪上加霜，而翘曲会随着中介层或基板尺寸增大而愈发明显。
